MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry M. Dorfman; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Wendell Davis.
Attorney, Margaret Dematteo is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Derek Buckner is present.
Attorney, Eugene Albert Chang is representing the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Wesley, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of December 30, 2013 is vacated.
